_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Panchsheel Pratishtha
project.address: Plot No. GH-01A, Sector 75, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.tagline: Refined Living Next to Sector 50 Metro
project.description: Panchsheel Pratishtha is a premium ready-to-move-in residential development in Central Noida, Sector 75, located walking distance from the metro.
project.long_description: Panchsheel Pratishtha is a highly premium residential enclave in Sector 75, Noida. Spread across approximately 5 acres of beautifully landscaped territory, this ready-to-move project consists of 8 high-rise towers rising up to G+17 floors. Housing 568 units, the community offers perfectly crafted 2 BHK + Study, 3 BHK, and 3 BHK + Servant configurations. Built using state-of-the-art Mivan/Korean aluminum formwork technology, the structures provide excellent safety, strength, and smooth finishes. One of the project's signature features is its 100% car-free ground level layout, ensuring maximum child safety and peace of mind by directing all vehicle flow immediately to the spacious basement parking. Superbly connected to central NCR, the development stands just 400 meters away from the Sector 50 Aqua Line Metro Station and directly across the street from the newly built Medanta Super-Speciality Hospital.
project.architect: Panchsheel In-House Architecture Team & Appointed Consultants
marketing_claims: Directly Across from Medanta Super-Speciality Hospital
Zero GST on Ready to Move

builder.name: Panchsheel Group
builder.company_overview: Panchsheel Group (incorporated as Panchsheel Buildtech Private Limited) is an acclaimed and mature real estate developer in the Delhi NCR region, active since 1989. Known for mid-segment residential projects and large township formats, the group has successfully developed over 38 lakh sq. ft. across Noida, Greater Noida, and Ghaziabad. Led by founder and Managing Director Ashok Chaudhary, the company has delivered over 7,000 units, establishing itself as a core player in affordable and mid-income housing.

unit_types.name: 2 BHK + Study (Comfort)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 2 BHK with integrated prayer/study alcove
unit_types.description: This thoughtfully configured unit layout maximizes usable carpet area, offering two well-ventilated bedrooms, two bathrooms, and an open layout combining living and dining zones. Features structural safety certs from IIT Roorkee and premium vitrified tile flooring.
whats_included: Vitrified tiles in living, dining, and bedrooms
Anti-skid ceramic tiles in toilets and balconies
Working kitchen counter with granite top and SS sink
Premium ISI-marked sanitary ware and CP fittings
Concealed copper wiring with modular switches

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Elite)
unit_types.subtitle: Premium 3 BHK with beautiful park views
unit_types.description: Standard 3 BHK design offering an efficient and bright living atmosphere. Generous kitchen space with an adjacent utility/balcony zone, master bedroom suite with attached bath, and double balconies looking directly over the central landscaped greens.
whats_included: Laminated wooden look flooring in master bedroom
Premium sanitary ware from Cera or Hindware
Intercom connection with main security gate

unit_types.name: 3 BHK + Study + Servant (Grande)
unit_types.subtitle: Flagship 3 BHK with separate servant room entry
unit_types.description: The largest premium layout in the project. Offers ultimate privacy with a dedicated servant quarter having separate access, a study/puja room, extensive wrap-around balconies, and walk-in wardrobe zones in the master suite.
whats_included: Modular kitchen complete with hub and chimney piping
Luxury bathroom fixtures and bath partition glass
AC ducting pre-installed in all master zones

connectivity.name: Noida Sector 50 Metro Station (Aqua Line)
connectivity.notes: Easiest immediate foot transit across Aqua Line, just 5 mins walk

connectivity.name: Spectrum Metro Mall
connectivity.notes: Major commercial high-street retail, multiplex, dining hub, 100m away

connectivity.name: Medanta Super-Speciality Hospital
connectivity.notes: State-of-the-art upcoming medical hub directly across the road

connectivity.name: FNG Expressway
connectivity.notes: Provides rapid connection to Ghaziabad, Greater Noida West

connectivity.name: Noida-Greater Noida Expressway
connectivity.notes: Easy link to SEZ corridors, Yamuna Expressway

assumptions: Ready-to-move project enjoys 0% GST (with valid Completion Certificate).
Stamp duty is calculated based on Uttar Pradesh circle rates (typically 7%).
Resale transactions incur an extra transfer charge and brokerage where applicable.

payment_plan.source: Official Builder and Resale Standard Practices
payment_plan.notes: For secondary resale markets, financial payouts and bank loans align with direct title registry timelines.

milestones.milestone: At Time of Booking / Token Advance
Noida Authority Registry / Handover of Keys

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Panchsheel Pratishtha is the ultimate family convenience choice in Sector 75, Noida, delivering an absolute car-free ground floor layout and walkable metro proximity at an optimal price per square foot.
why_buy: Incredible Foot Connectivity: Under 5 mins walk to Sector 50 Aqua Line Metro and Spectrum Mall.
100% Car-Free Ground Floor: Maximum child and elder safety as all cars route directly into the basement parking.
Immediate Hospital Access: Directly opposite the newly inaugurated Medanta Super-Speciality Hospital.
Mivan Structural Safety: Built using Korean aluminum formwork technology, certified by IIT Roorkee.
Zero GST Liability: Since the project is fully completed, buyers pay 0% GST.
why_avoid: Highly Leveraged Developer: Panchsheel Group has higher debt on its books which can sometimes affect common infrastructure funding.
Busy Peak-Hour Club: Density of 113 units per acre means swimming pool and club amenities can feel crowded on weekends.
decision_profile.best_for: Working corporate families and senior citizens who prioritize immediate metro/mall connectivity, child safety, and direct medical access.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative short-term investors looking for rapid capital arbitrage or buyers seeking ultra-low-density villa living.
decision_profile.recommendation_notes: Highly practical buy for end-users. Check that there are no pending maintenance dues on individual resale flats.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Registry is open and active. Ensure the resale seller has obtained a valid No-Dues Certificate (NOC) from Noida Authority and the builder before locking price.

buyerPersonas.headline: Maximum Transit and Kid Safety
reasons: 100% car-free ground floor allows kids to play and cycle without traffic risks.
400m walk to Sector 50 metro station for stress-free corporate commutes.

buyerPersonas.headline: Medical Hub Proximity and Peaceful Walks
reasons: Medanta Hospital is directly across the street for quick medical attention.
Noise-free central park walks with no vehicle noise on ground level.

buyerPersonas.headline: High-Demand Tenant Node
reasons: Massive tenant demand from professionals working in Noida Sector 62 and 135/142 IT corridors.
Ready-to-move-in status ensures immediate rental cash flow.

riskRadar.description: Project is completely built and handed over. Completion Certificate is active.
Registries are actively being executed in Noida Authority. Ensure specific title NOC is obtained.
High transaction volume in Sector 75 ensures robust secondary markets.
Developer carries substantial corporate debt; ensure common facilities have been officially handed over to the AOA.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Driven by central Noida's physical infrastructure maturity, the opening of Medanta hospital, and high high-street commercial density.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Excellent demand due to metro connectivity. Standard 3 BHK commands Rs 35,000 - Rs 45,000 per month.
investment_insights.market_desc: Stable resale values with robust transaction volume from secondary end-users.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Secondary sales are highly liquid due to immediate readiness and strong regional appeal.

location_highlights.title: Sector 50 Metro
location_highlights.description: Aqua line metro station with seamless link to Sector 52 interchange.

location_highlights.title: Spectrum Mall
location_highlights.description: Massive high-street commercial and multiplex hub.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Unrivalled Walkability
neighborhood_advantages.description: Sector 75 offers the best immediate pedestrian access to transit and premium retail in central Noida.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Transit Infrastructure
neighborhood_advantages.description: Excellent connectivity via Link Road, FNG, and Aqua Line directly connecting Noida IT parks and Delhi.

persona_descriptions.Working Corporate Families: Established nuclear families with school-going children who need immediate housing with excellent child safety (car-free ground floor), walking-distance metro transit for corporate work, and nearby markets.
persona_descriptions.Senior Citizens: Retired couples desiring quiet central gardens, traffic-free walking paths, and immediate physical access to Medanta Hospital directly across the road.
persona_descriptions.IT Professionals: Mid-to-senior engineers working in Sector 62/63 or Expressway corridors desiring high convenience, rapid transit, and a vibrant neighborhood with walk-to shopping malls.
persona_descriptions.Yield-First Investors: Conservative investors looking for stable rental assets that command premium rents and 0% delivery risk.

persona_profile.income_range: Rs 20 Lakh - Rs 35 Lakh per annum
persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative — prefers completed ready-to-move-in assets with active registrations
persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear family with small children and elderly parents
persona_profile.work_location: Noida Sector 62/63 IT Hub or Sector 125-142 IT Expressway corridor
persona_profile.motivation_note: A convenient, secure ready-to-move-in society with zero delivery risk and excellent neighborhood walkability to keep daily commute times under 30 minutes.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Panchsheel Pratishtha is one of the most practical and convenience-centric ready-to-move-in residential societies in Central Noida. Its absolute car-free ground floor and pedestrian proximity to the metro make it a highly desirable end-use asset.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: For end-users, the project is a dream of daily convenience. You can literally walk out of the gate and reach the Sector 50 Metro station or Spectrum Mall within 5 minutes. The lack of vehicular traffic on the ground floor means kids and seniors have a highly secure outdoor lifestyle.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: For investors, the asset offers premium, stable rental yields (up to 4.2% annually) driven by high occupancy and organic tenant demand from Noida IT hubs. Capital appreciation will remain moderate and steady, behaving as a reliable defensive asset.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: An outstanding choice for families. The car-free podium format ensures absolute safety, and top CBSE schools like Broadways International are reachable under 10 minutes.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Excellent yield play. The walkable location to commercial offices and the Metro guarantees very low vacancy rates and strong, inflation-protected rent escalations.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Provides standard premium specifications with robust construction (Korean Mivan Formwork). It does not qualify as ultra-luxury (like Ivy County or Dasnac Burj), but represents the perfect premium-mid segment sweet spot.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Delivery risk is absolutely zero. Title and registration risks are low but present on individual resale units. Ensure that the seller's specific flat has zero pending dues with Noida Authority and that the NOC from both the builder and society AOA is fully signed off.
walk_away_conditions: Any specific resale unit where Noida Authority outstanding dues on the tower prevent active flat registration.
Units where the seller demands high undeclared cash components above circle rate valuations.
negotiation_leverage: Leverage the developer's general corporate debt news to negotiate a discount with resale owners who are eager to exit.
Benchmark against Gardenia Gateway which is heavily discounted due to NCLT and registry bans, using it to keep Panchsheel prices grounded.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Ready to move immediately. No construction risk. Lock the transaction if a fully registered resale unit is available between Rs 13,000 and Rs 14,000 per sqft.
recommendation_profile.admin_notes: Project is completely delivered. Common area infrastructure has been handed over to the AOA. Solid resale momentum.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Significantly lower entry pricing (approx Rs 13,500/sqft vs Rs 15,000+/sqft); closer walkable proximity to Sector 50 Metro and Medanta Hospital.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Higher specification quality, lower overall density, more luxurious lobby/clubhouse experience, and more premium branding.
competitors.verdict: Choose Dasnac if budget permits and lower density luxury is your primary aim; choose Panchsheel Pratishtha for outstanding day-to-day walkability, family safety, and better price-to-carpet value.
competitors.price_delta_note: Panchsheel Pratishtha is Rs 1,500 - Rs 2,000 per sqft more affordable than Dasnac The Jewel.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Closer proximity to Metro and mall (walkable 5 mins vs 10+ mins); superior 100% car-free ground podium layout.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Slightly larger configurations and more expansive balcony sizing in 3 BHK types.
competitors.verdict: Panchsheel Pratishtha wins on daily commute convenience and family pedestrian safety.
competitors.price_delta_note: Priced almost at par, with Panchsheel commanding a tiny premium (~Rs 300/sqft) due to closer metro location.
